title: Dylan's Cozy Vanilla+
description: A cozy Vanilla+ modpack focused on performance, quality-of-life improvements, and multiplayer-friendly features while keeping the classic Minecraft experience intact.
body:
# 🌿 Dylan's Cozy Vanilla+

**Dylan's Cozy Vanilla+** is a lightweight **Vanilla+ modpack** designed to enhance the Minecraft experience while staying true to the core game.

The goal of this pack is simple:  
**make Minecraft smoother, more immersive, and more enjoyable without changing the vanilla gameplay players love.**

It focuses on **quality-of-life improvements, performance optimizations, and small immersive additions** that feel like they belong in vanilla.

---

## ✨ Features

⚡ **Performance Improvements**  
Optimized mods that help improve FPS and overall game performance.

🧰 **Quality-of-Life Enhancements**  
Small tweaks that make everyday gameplay smoother and more enjoyable.

🎮 **Vanilla-Friendly Design**  
No drastic gameplay changes — Minecraft still feels like Minecraft.

👥 **Built for Multiplayer**  
The pack was designed with **servers and community play in mind**, making it perfect for playing with friends.

🎤 **Proximity Voice Chat Support**  
Includes support for the **Simple Voice Chat** mod, allowing players to talk with nearby players in-game.

🪶 **Lightweight & Fast**  
Quick to load and easy to run on most systems.

---

## 👥 Multiplayer Focus

This modpack was created for the **Dylan's Cozy Place** community server and is designed to work great in **multiplayer environments**.

With performance improvements, helpful UI mods, and proximity voice chat, it helps make playing together **more social, immersive, and fun**.

Whether you're **building towns, exploring caves, or going on adventures with friends**, the experience stays smooth and cozy.

---

## 📦 Installation

1. Install using the **Modrinth App**
2. Launch the game
3. Join a server or start a world

---

## ☕ The Vision

> A cozy Vanilla+ experience designed for **friends, communities, and multiplayer survival**.
